meta.title: How Will the COVID-19 Pandemic Change Manufacturing and Technology Supply Chains?
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute and the Manufacturing Policy Initiative at Indiana University for an inside look at how U.S. firms and supportive institutions are thinking about long-term changes in global supply chains amid a global pandemic and into the future.
